entries.name: KoeNote
entries.notes: KoeNote application source code is licensed under the Apache License 2.0. Third-party libraries, runtime tools, and models are governed by their respective licenses.

entries.name: Microsoft.Data.Sqlite
entries.notes: Verify package license metadata during release packaging.

entries.name: ffmpeg.exe
entries.notes: Used for local audio normalization before ASR.

entries.name: Python 3.12 x64 runtime
entries.notes: Bundled so ASR and speaker diarization setup do not depend on host Python. Python packages such as faster-whisper, diarize, torch, and torchaudio are downloaded during first-run setup and are governed by their respective package licenses.

entries.name: llama.cpp CPU x64 runtime
entries.notes: Bundled so the Review stage can run after a Review GGUF model is installed. KoeNote uses the CPU x64 binary to avoid adding a GPU driver dependency.

entries.name: Prism llama.cpp CPU x64 runtime
entries.notes: Optional runtime for hidden/experimental Ternary Bonsai Q2_0 models. It is not required for default release builds.
